title: Asset Management
excerpt:
Description
Using Monday as a ticketing and Asset Management system and software management 
What are you trying to achieve
I want the ability to do proper asset management and software usage inventory within Monday

posts.author: aviserber (Avi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Using Monday as a ticketing and Asset Management system and software management

What are you trying to achieve

I want the ability to do proper asset management and software usage inventory within Monday

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @aviserber

Could you describe where it’s falling over for you? We find monday to be great for asset/software management.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: aviserber (Avi)
posts.cookedHtml: i should have said, automate the addition of assets with an agent or network scan. Additionally, i would like a software asset management system to be able to look at software utilization.
